creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
wen         2011-06-20 14:02:08 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia           Makefile 
  Added files:
    multimedia/umplayer  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    multimedia/umplayer/files patch-src_umplayer.cpp 
  Log:
  UMPlayer is the multimedia player that fills all your needs. With dozens
  of advanced features and built-in codecs it can handle any media format,
  and can play Audio CDs, DVDs, (S)VCDs, TV / Radio cards, YouTube" and
  SHOUTcast" streams and even incomplete or damaged media files.
  
  WWW: http://www.umplayer.com/
  
  PR:             ports/157551
  Submitted by:   Zhihao Yuan <lichray@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.453     +1 -0      ports/multimedia/Makefile
  1.1       +46 -0     ports/multimedia/umplayer/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/multimedia/umplayer/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +19 -0     ports/multimedia/umplayer/files/patch-src_umplayer.cpp (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/multimedia/umplayer/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +286 -0    ports/multimedia/umplayer/pkg-plist (new)
